---
pagetitle: "Inscriere | Idea Marathon"
---

::: {.domain-hero}

::: {.logo-text}
[CRAIOVA]{.logo-craiova} [TEEN HUB]{.logo-teenhub}
:::

# Inscrie-te

::: {.tagline}
Completeaza formularul si rezerva-ti locul.
:::

:::

::: {.form-section}

::: {.form-container}

<form action="https://formspree.io/f/YOUR_FORM_ID" method="POST">

<div class="form-group">
<label for="name">Nume complet</label>
<input type="text" id="name" name="name" required placeholder="Prenume si nume">
</div>

<div class="form-group">
<label for="email">Email</label>
<input type="email" id="email" name="email" required placeholder="adresa@email.com">
</div>

<div class="form-group">
<label for="phone">Telefon</label>
<input type="tel" id="phone" name="phone" required placeholder="07XX XXX XXX">
</div>

<div class="form-group">
<label for="school">Liceul</label>
<input type="text" id="school" name="school" required placeholder="Numele liceului">
</div>

<div class="form-group">
<label for="domain">Domeniu preferat</label>
<select id="domain" name="domain" required>
<option value="" disabled selected>Alege un domeniu</option>
<option value="comunitate">Comunitate</option>
<option value="sanatate">Sanatate</option>
<option value="mediu">Mediu & Oras</option>
<option value="media-digitala">Media digitala</option>
<option value="educatie">Educatie</option>
<option value="tehnologie">Tehnologie & AI</option>
</select>
</div>

<div class="form-group">
<label for="overnight">Raman peste noapte?</label>
<select id="overnight" name="overnight" required>
<option value="" disabled selected>Alege</option>
<option value="da">Da</option>
<option value="nu">Nu</option>
</select>
</div>

<div class="form-group">
<label for="message">De ce vrei sa participi? (optional)</label>
<textarea id="message" name="message" rows="4" placeholder="Spune-ne pe scurt ce te motiveaza..."></textarea>
</div>

<button type="submit" class="form-submit">TRIMITE INSCRIEREA</button>

</form>

:::

:::

::: {.site-footer}

::: {.logo-text .logo-text-sm}
[CRAIOVA]{.logo-craiova} [TEEN HUB]{.logo-teenhub}
:::

Liceul SRB | Idea Marathon 2026

:::
